description:
Perform a diagnostic analysis on the 'ExamAnxiety.csv' dataset by fitting a Linear Regression model predicting 'Exam' scores based on 'Anxiety' and 'Revise'. Determine the student with the highest Cook's Distance. Create a report at '~/Documents/Jamovi/influential_student_report.txt' with the following format:
model_r_squared: <value>
max_cooks_distance: <value>
student_code: <Student ID/Code>
Save the Jamovi project to '~/Documents/Jamovi/Influential_Analysis.omv'.
